AR1.justification: Nothing was written to decisions.md or any other canonical file; the agent narrated about routing rather than executing it, so no misroute occurred but no correct routing decision was made either.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis does not apply.

AR3.justification: Referenced tmp/adr-draft.md and decisions.md by relative name in the narration; nothing brittle, nothing emitted as a real anchor either.

AR4.justification: No files were written, so the workspace state is unchanged and a re-run would be coherent.
